nodes.text:
Symptoms include abdominal discomfort, altered bowel habit, reduced appetite, and intermittent bloating for 5 weeks. Patient also reports night sweats. Relevant history includes coeliac disease.


CT on 12/02/2025:  lesion in the low rectum, no metastases
